channel.title: French Press on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in French Press on Barista At Home

item.title: Coffee Grind Size Guide: Chart for Every Brewing Method
item.description: The complete coffee grind size reference — espresso, pour over, French press, AeroPress, cold brew, drip, and moka pot. Includes a full comparison chart and troubleshooting tips.

item.title: How to Use a French Press: Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Complete guide on how to use a French press coffee maker. Step-by-step instructions, grind size, ratio, steep time, common mistakes, and tips for perfect French press coffee every time.

item.title: French Press Ratio: How Much Coffee Per Cup (and Why It Matters)
item.description: The ideal French press coffee-to-water ratio is 1:15 — 1 gram of coffee per 15 grams of water. Here's exactly how much to use for every cup size, plus how to adjust for taste.
